title: Modern Creepers
description: A modern retexture of the creeper whilst keeping it's original concept.
body:
**ENTITY TEXTURE FEATURES REQUIRED**

This resource pack modernises the creeper texture by taking the original concept of it being made of leaves and being able to blend in and sneak up on you and making it work in modern versions.

I have tried to make this as Vanilla feeling as possible and like how Mojang would do it.

In this pack creepers have biome dependant textures for every biome in the game, including ones where they cant spawn. Some biomes will have mutiple randomized textures and some textures are weather specific.

This pack will not change the spawning of any mobs. Creepers will not spawn naturally in the Nether, End, Deep Dark or Mushroom Fields.

Biome Types:

Plains
Meadow (2)
Forest (2)
Birch Forest (2)
Dark Forest (2)
Swamp
Mangrove Swamp (2)
Cold
Snowy (2)
Cherry Grove (2)
Jungle
Badlands (2)
Warm
Pale Garden
Mushroom Fields (2)
Dripstone Cave
Lush Cave
Deep Dark
Crimson Forest
Warped Forest
End

Warm cold and snowy biomes are all that fall into that category without a personal texture.
All other biomes use a fitting texture from a different biome.
Biomes with a (2) next means there are multiple randomized textures for that biome.

Custom Spawn Egg included.
